TELUS Digital (TIXT) addresses recent share trading, related to changes in social media fact-checking practices.
news.summary: TELUS Digital Experience, a leading company listed on NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol TIXT, has released a statement addressing recent trading activity involving its subordinate voting shares. Media reports have been circulating following an announcement made on January 7, 2025, by a prominent social media platform regarding changes to its third-party fact-checking approach in the U.S. This has sparked discussions on content moderation. The company aims to provide clarity amidst the ongoing market developments.

news.headline: MT Sobek now outfitter for REI Adventures trips, as REI exits travel space - effective Jan 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Emeryville, California on January 10th, 2025, MT Sobek, a leading adventure travel company, has revealed its new partnership as the outfitter for the well-known tours previously operated by REI Adventures. Following REI Adventures' departure from the adventure travel industry, individuals now have the opportunity to reschedule their trips with MT Sobek.

news.headline: MarketsandMarkets™ report projects future of robotics market to 2030, covering various technologies and industries.
news.summary: A recent report released on January 10, 2025 in Delray Beach, Florida discusses the future of robotics focusing on various types of robots including cobots, humanoid robots, soft robots, and swarm robotics. The report analyzes the impact of technologies such as artificial intelligence, digital twin, AR/VR, and cloud computing on the robotics sector. It delves into different industries where robotics are being utilized such as automotive, smart cities, space exploration, logistics, and agriculture. This comprehensive study provides insights into the advancements and trends in robotics across diverse sectors.

Snail Games' ARK: Ultimate Mobile Edition surpasses 3M downloads in 3 weeks, seen as strong early adoption.
news.summary: In Culver City, California, on January 10, 2024, Snail, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNAL), known as Snail Games, a prominent independent developer and publisher of interactive digital entertainment, partnered with Studio Wildcard and developer Grove Street Games. This collaboration was announced to the public.

Judge in Trump hush money case imposes no jail or fine but sentence places judgment of guilt on president-elect's record.
Peoples Financial Services Corp. appoints Gerard A. Champi as CEO and Thomas P. Tulaney as President.
news.summary: In Dunmore, Pennsylvania, on January 10, 2025, Peoples Financial Services Corp. revealed that Gerard A. Champi has been appointed as the Chief Executive Officer (CEO), while Thomas P. Tulaney has been named President for both the Company.

news.headline: Blake Lively files lawsuit against Wayfarer Studios, alleging harassment by co-star and director. Case analyzed by legal experts.
news.summary: In Bridgewater, N.J., on Jan. 10, 2025, Blake Lively filed a lawsuit against Wayfarer Studios, LLC, accusing her It Ends with Us (2024) co-star and director, Justin Baldoni, as well as producer James Heath of unscripted harassment. The lawsuit was filed by Norris McLaughlin, P.A.'s The Employment Strategists Podcast.

news.headline: Midea unveils energy-efficient heat pump water heater in Louisville, Ky., on Jan. 10, 2025, pioneering sustainable heating.
news.summary: Cutting-edge Home Appliance Promises Superior Efficiency, Performance, and Simple Setup LOUISVILLE, Ky., Jan. 10, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- The growing preference for energy-efficient and environmentally friendly heating solutions has made heat pump technology increasingly popular. Recently, a revolutionary appliance has been introduced, offering exceptional efficiency and performance, as well as easy installation. This marks a significant advancement in the push towards sustainability.

news.headline: TD SYNNEX Q4: Revenue $15.85B, up 10% Y/Y; Adjusted EPS $3.09 beats street view; Gross billings $21.2B; Stock gains.
news.summary: TD SYNNEX Corp (SNX) saw its stock rise after releasing its Q4 results. The company reported quarterly revenue of $15.85 billion, a 10% increase year-over-year, surpassing the analyst estimate of $15.22 billion. Their adjusted EPS was $3.09, beating expectations of $3.05. Revenue grew by 9.2% on a constant currency basis, driven by growth in Advanced Solutions and Endpoint Solutions. Adjusted gross billings for the quarter were $21.2 billion, up from $19.7 billion in the same quarter last year. Gross profit increased to $1.04 billion from $1.02 billion in the previous year.

news.headline: US Treasury sanctions entities tied to Gazprom Neft.
Constellation Brands Q3 sales were $2.46 billion, Beer segment up 3% to $2.03 billion, Wine and Spirits down 14% to $431.4 million, but stock slides.
news.summary: Constellation Brands Inc (NYSE:STZ) saw a decrease in shares following its third-quarter report, which revealed almost stagnant sales of $2.46 billion, falling short of the anticipated $2.53 billion. Within its segments, Beer sales rose by 3% year-over-year to reach $2.03 billion, while Wine and Spirits experienced a 14% decline, totaling $431.4 million. Beer shipment volume saw a 1.6% increase, whereas Wine and Spirits dropped by 16.4%. Gross profit went up by 1% to $1.28 billion, although operating income decreased by 0.4% to $793 million. The operating margin for the quarter stood at ... Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tilray's Q2 net revenue grew by 9% to $210.95 mil, missing consensus. Alcohol revenue increased by 36%. Cannabis revenue dropped slightly to $66 mil. Gross profit rose by 29% to $61 mil.
news.summary: Tilray Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: TLRY) reported a 9% year-over-year increase in second-quarter net revenue to $210.95 million, slightly below the expected $216.91 million. On a constant currency basis, net revenue saw a 10% increase.Specifically, beverage alcohol net revenue rose by 36% to $63 million, while cannabis net revenue was $66 million compared to $67 million in the same quarter last year. Distribution net revenue was $68 million, up from $67 million a year ago, and wellness net revenue increased by 13% to $15 million.The gross profit grew by 29% to $61 million in the second quarter, up from $47 million in the previous year. Weed stocks took a hit in 2024 amid allegations of bias during cannabis rescheduling hearings by the DEA. More information is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: VicOne at CES 2025 highlights cybersecurity solutions and partnerships, showcasing its industry-leading array of partners.
news.summary: VicOne, a prominent automotive cybersecurity solutions provider, recently highlighted its participation in CES 2025 held in Las Vegas. At the event's conclusion, VicOne showcased its acclaimed cybersecurity software and services portfolio along with its extensive network of partnerships. Recognizing the intricate nature of the automotive sector, VicOne emphasized the importance of collaboration in securing the industry. They emphasized the significance of their diverse and top-tier partners in addressing cybersecurity challenges.

news.headline: Canada Foreign Minister: Canada cabinet ministers will discuss retaliatory tariffs on the US in meeting on Friday.
NASA FCU partners with Alkami to improve digital card capabilities, boosting member convenience and payment security.
news.summary: Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT), headquartered in Plano, Texas, announced on January 10, 2025, that they are improving member experience by introducing digital card features. These advancements aim to simplify transactions for members and enhance payment security. Alkami is a prominent provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions, focusing on empowering individuals to transact efficiently.

news.headline: Bright MLS report: 17,593 closed sales in Dec 2024, sales up 14.4% from 2023. Region saw 2.5% growth in sales for the year.
news.summary: In December, there was a notable decrease in the number of homes listed for sale, hitting a record low. Throughout the Bright MLS service area, there were 17,593 closed sales reported for the month, marking a substantial 14.4% increase from December 2023. On an annual basis, the region saw a 2.5% rise in total sales compared to the previous year. The limited inventory situation...

news.headline: Detroit rapper Lou Gram, "Big Shifter," to open Fly Shifter Cannabis Store, reflecting his vision and dedication.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Detroit, Lou Gram, also known as "Big Shifter," a renowned rapper, businessperson, and supporter of the community, unveiled the launch of Fly Shifter Cannabis. This high-end cannabis store is a manifestation of his innovative approach and commitment to serving the community.

news.headline: Knowledge Graph Market expected to reach $6,938.4 million by 2030 from $1,068.4 million in 2024, CAGR of 36.6%.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects substantial growth in the Knowledge Graph Market, with an estimated value of USD 6,938.4 million by 2030. This marks a significant increase from the USD 1,068.4 million recorded in 2024. The report forecasts a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 36.6% between 2024 and 2030.

news.headline: China Automotive Multimodal Interaction Development Report 2024: AI transforms cockpits, advancing from perceptual to cognitive intelligence - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report titled "China Automotive Multimodal Interaction Development Research Report, 2024" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report focuses on multimodal interaction research in the automotive sector. It highlights the integration of AI foundation models into vehicle cockpits, leading to the evolution of perceptual intelligence into cognitive intelligence. The research delves into various interaction modes used in mainstream vehicle cockpits and their applications. This insightful report provides a comprehensive analysis of the development of automotive multimodal interactions in China.

news.headline: Sui (CRYPTO: SUI) price surged 8.25% in 24 hours to $4.98, up 9.0% in a week. All-time high at $5.35.
news.summary: Over the last 24 hours, the price of Sui (CRYPTO: SUI) has risen by 8.25% to reach $4.98. In the past week, SUI has seen a 9.0% increase, starting at $4.5 and climbing to its current value. The all-time high for Sui currently stands at $5.35. This data indicates a positive trend in the coin's value. For further details on price movements and volatility, refer to relevant charts.

news.headline: Tractor Supply and Miranda Lambert’s MuttNation Foundation start third annual Relief for Rescues. Customers can donate from Jan 12-22.
news.summary: Tractor Supply Company, the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the US, along with Miranda Lambert’s MuttNation Foundation, disclosed the comeback of the Relief for Rescues fundraiser. The event aims to aid shelter animals affected by calamities like floods, fires, hurricanes, and tornadoes. Running from January 12 to 22, customers have the opportunity to contribute to the Relief for Rescues Fund, which offers financial assistance for affected animals. Tractor Supply Company's involvement, alongside MuttNation Foundation, underscores their commitment to supporting animal welfare efforts.

news.headline: Hilton (NYSE: HLT) to report Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Feb 6, 2025. CEO and CFO to discuss performance in conference call.
news.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) is scheduled to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 before the market opens on Thursday, February 6, 2025. A conference call will follow at 9 a.m. EST on the same day. During the call, Christopher J. Nassetta, the President, and CEO of Hilton, along with Kevin Jacobs, the Chief Financial Officer and President of Global Development at Hilton, will present the company's performance and engage in a Q&A session. Those interested can tune in to the call.

news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Australian company Kazia Therapeutics Limited (NASDAQ: KZIA) revealed an agreement for the sale of a total of 1,333,333 units. Kazia is a company specializing in developing drugs for cancer treatment.
